title: How to Disqualify a Supplier
alt: Six-step process for disqualifying a pharmaceutical supplier

items.label: Investigate & document
items.desc: Raise a deviation, do root-cause analysis, capture the risk assessment

items.label: Convene decision-makers
items.desc: Cross-functional call: Quality, QP/RP, procurement, regulatory, supply

items.label: Assess patient & supply impact
items.desc: Find affected stock, qualify an alternative, weigh MHRA notification

items.label: Quarantine affected material
items.desc: Hold suspect batches; decide on testing, rejection or recall

items.label: Communicate formally
items.desc: Notify supplier in writing: basis, scope and effective date

items.label: Update controlled records
items.desc: Amend approved list, specs, agreements and ERP master data
